pi_items.source: task.json description and setup_task.sh cleanup loop

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on synthetically generated SciNote entities (project, experiment, and task) injected directly into the PostgreSQL database via setup_task.sh. The expected new names for the project ('PET Degradation Kinetics Study'), experiment ('Thermal Decomposition Analysis'), and task ('TGA Sample Preparation') are explicitly provided as hardcoded strings in the task description instructions. The setup script also references the expected project name in its cleanup routine, confirming these values. All metadata claims exactly match the task parameters.
